intake.user_request: Fix indexing-orchestrator.ts to include layer in RAG vector chunk metadata so --constraint layer returns results.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Dispatch-003 analysis shows orchestrator already propagates layer conditionally at lines 748-749. The root gap (node.metadata.layer unpopulated) is dispatch-002's domain. This WO confirms orchestrator correctness via a targeted integration test — single file addition, no blast radius.

findings.orchestrator_status: CORRECT — layer already propagated at indexing-orchestrator.ts:748-749 via conditional spread
findings.root_cause: 0/2795 graph.json nodes have node.metadata.layer populated — dispatch-002 (semantic-header-parser parse gap) is the upstream fix
findings.gap: No integration test verifies layer flows from chunk.layer → VectorRecord.metadata.layer through indexCodebase(). Type-only tests exist (AC-05, AC-06) but no end-to-end flow test.

in_scope: Add integration test: chunk.layer → vectorRecord.metadata.layer via indexCodebase()
Test confirms layer is present in vector record metadata when chunk carries layer

constraints: Test must use the graph.json → indexCodebase path (useAnalyzer: true)
No new prod code changes — test addition only
